{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032114251547137656F16F2520C13D"}"},"total":2405},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7604462139895431960","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看多了“杀伐果断”的爽文，再看看这种挺有意思的。作者水平不一般，糅合了男频文和女频文，感情方面确实写得很不错。也没有什么过于无脑的剧情。不够看完全不够看。这种剧情其实挺适合排电视剧的[盯]预祝作者大卖[盯]","text_exts":[{"e":8,"s":4,"text":"杀伐果断","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%9D%80%E4%BC%90%E6%9E%9C%E6%96%AD&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317740743152520C13D%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227604462139895431960%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227583155436698733592%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%9D%80%E4%BC%90%E6%9E%9C%E6%96%AD%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770554968,"group_id":"7583155436698733592","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/vsINRKkesSLQhWmcMH9ig=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/fe4e98b4ad3745649e4554181033de5d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776623416&x-signature=xIacH5rkGfdOix6aSxjjeAVk4FM%3D","user_id":"870403758896456","user_name":"<。)#)))≦咸鱼"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"870403758896456","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1778656170,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7583155436698733592","book_info":{"abstract":"（单女主+都市+HE）林见深穿越了，魂穿到一个虐待义妹的人渣身上。
看着少女遍体鳞伤的样子，他决定，这恶名他背了，但这人，他必须救。
他在短剧里演活了无数角色，却在她日渐依赖的目光中越来越慌。
他以为自己骗过了她，却没想到，她扑进怀里：“我知道你不是他。”
“求求你…永远别离开我。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/317b22e212849e8b5ed68a8617b52b16","author":"摘星阁阁主","author_id":"","book_id":"7583155436698733592","book_name":"夺舍人渣，妹妹看我眼神不对劲","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"44.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":261,"name":"都市日常","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=261&name=都市日常&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7583171222658105880","read_count":"443895","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"476941"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.7","serial_count":"194","tags":"都市日常,都市,穿越,单女主,无后宫,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/0bdb965be1c7172599f2c9be356cc67e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779258315&x-signature=HsiCsJq7d%2Fad6MXAzcWN%2Bqof7lQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4068654154526312","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"125"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032114251547137656F16F2520C13D"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":24,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":10641,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":15870},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7599687042792211262","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这应该是我在同类型小说里面见过最好的一个了，首先是兄妹俩的感情上升挺快的，并且这种情感的上升是有逻辑性，有合理性的。情感描写也很顺滑。
我之前看的这种类型的小说，男主会死命隐藏穿越者的身份，妹妹也看不穿，然后男主一边演戏，一边展示善意，妹妹就会一边害怕，一边胡思乱想。然后两边就开始拉扯，我进来是看你俩拉扯的？
这本小说就摒弃了这些，虽然男主开局是想要伪装成原主的，但是妹妹她不傻，直接给看穿了，以这个为契机，妹妹在情感上的快速上升，就有了足够合理的前提条件，加上作者对情感描写把握很好，有循序渐进，有前置的铺垫，给我一种良好的代入感。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769442507,"group_id":"7583155436698733592","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N75/Uu0DX/A+YNTuUtUYOOHHWBLopfOJTLB1rSc0YfkJ","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/7f616b0f8bbf4437853def31ef94e73c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776616038&x-signature=OWpOwrNIebSFRdctYjIw0vSfwlY%3D","user_id":"1231897893540599","user_name":"蓬莱寺九霄|ω・）"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1231897893540599","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7583155436698733592","book_info":{"abstract":"（单女主+都市+HE）林见深穿越了，魂穿到一个虐待义妹的人渣身上。
